top_signals.title: Fed’s Case for Cutting Rates ‘Very, Very Weak,' Bill Dudley Says
top_signals.summary: Bill Dudley, former New York Fed President and Bloomberg Opinion columnist, examines the effectiveness of Federal Reserve policy and the central bank’s credibility on inflation. His opinions are his own. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Microsoft’s new responsible tech lead on how to humanize high-speed AI development
top_signals.summary: Jenny Lay-Flurrie, head of Microsoft's Trusted Technology Group, says responsible tech is: How do we build it right? And how do we keep it that way?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Philip R. Lane: Europe and the world economy
‘Epstein class’ becomes a populist battle cry in US politics
top_signals.summary: Accusations of elite impunity loom over November’s midterm elections

top_signals.title: US Marine Corps tests using helicopter as mobile drone command center
top_signals.summary: During the test, troops launched a Neros Archer FPV drone from the ground before transferring control to operators aboard a helicopter orbiting miles away.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong advances virtual asset advisory and management rulemaking
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong moves to license crypto advisers and managers under anti-money laundering rules, with a 2026 legislative target.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Sanmar's Dual Fuel Methanol Escort Tug Receives Full Class Certification
top_signals.summary: Sanmar Shipyards has reached a milestone in sustainable maritime innovation as SD AISEMAHT, the world's first dual fuel methanol escort and rescue tug built for KOTUG Canada, has officially been granted full class certification by ABS.Constructed…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
